prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约18911名（2021理科）→21139名（2022理科）→20092名（2023理科）→18722名（2024理科）→32426名（2025物理类）。2021–2024年位次在18722–21139之间窄幅波动，2025年因山西省高考模式从文理分科改为'3+1+2'新高考，科类从'理科'变为'物理类'，批次从'本科一批A段'变为'本科批'，位次体系发生结构性变化，最低位次大幅后移至32426名，成为最新基准；该校在山西省2021–2025年各科类招生计划均为70人，2026年物理类招生计划仍为70人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招，招生规模对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第134名，近年排名在134–162之间波动，整体处于中下游211层次，学校层次对高分考生吸引力有限；2022年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，投档线曾出现逐年下降趋势；2023年周期评价转为偏正面（食堂服务好、宿舍有自习室）；2026年周期该校未出现在学校声誉事件列表中，无重大负面舆情。抖音热度总排名第86位，评价为'一般'，综合热度225003，短视频平台曝光度偏低，未形成明显的报考关注升温信号。历史投档异常方面，2022年曾出现投档线逐年下降的负面信号，但近年已趋于平稳；第五轮学科评估中，畜牧学获评A，作物学获评A-，是该校核心优势学科。招生专业中动物科学对应畜牧学A，农学类相关专业对应作物学A-，对农林类考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐，社会报考热度高；临床医学/动物医学为推荐；会计/财务/审计为推荐；法学为分化观望；土木建筑为分化观望；生化环材为明显劝退。该校招生专业以农林、生物、环境、食品等为主，整体专业热度偏冷。山西省考生规模方面，2025年物理类考生约173347人，2026年物理类约167419人，减少约5928人（约-3.4%），考生总数下降使竞争略有缓解。；四川农业大学位于四川省成都市，在山西省招生占比约4.68%（2025年），属于跨省招生，无本地倾斜优势。该校在四川本省招生占比远高于外省，山西考生报考时需考虑地域偏好因素。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次走势、2026年招生计划持平、山西省物理类考生减少约3.4%、学校层次中下游211、专业热度偏冷、抖音关注度一般等因素，在2025年基准位次32426名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次将略有前移（竞争略缓）。预测最低位次约32226名，区间31726–32726名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约32226名，区间31726–32726名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业作为冲刺（电气、计算机等热门专业位次需求通常高于校线），三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如低于31726名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限则建议以三档保底为主。该校优势学科畜牧学A和作物学A-对应的动物科学、农学类专业虽学科实力强但社会热度偏低，适合对农林领域有明确兴趣的考生以较低位次进入优势专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 18911 (2021 Science) → 21139 (2022 Science) → 20092 (2023 Science) → 18722 (2024 Science) → 32426 (2025 Physics Category). Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 18722 and 21139 from 2021 to 2024. In 2025, due to Shanxi Province's college entrance exam reform from arts/science division to the '3+1+2' new model, the category changed from 'Science' to 'Physics Category', and the batch changed from 'Undergraduate Batch 1 Section A' to 'Undergraduate Batch', causing a structural shift in the ranking system. The minimum ranking dropped significantly to 32426, becoming the new baseline. The university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province remained at 70 students for all categories from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan remains 70 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, making the enrollment scale neutral to competition dynamics.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science China University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 134th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 134 and 162, placing it in the mid-to-lower tier of 211 universities. The university's level has limited appeal to high-scoring candidates. In the 2022 college entrance cycle, its reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with a trend of declining admission scores year by year. In the 2023 cycle, the evaluation turned slightly positive (good cafeteria service, dormitories with study rooms). In the 2026 cycle, the university did not appear in the list of school reputation events, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 86th overall, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive heat index of 225003, indicating low exposure on short video platforms and no clear signal of rising application interest. Historically, abnormal admission scores occurred in 2022 with a year-on-year decline, but this has stabilized in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Animal Science was rated A, and Crop Science was rated A-, making them the university's core advantageous disciplines. Among the enrollment majors, Animal Science corresponds to the A-rated Animal Science discipline, and agriculture-related majors correspond to the A- rated Crop Science discipline, attracting some candidates interested in agriculture and forestry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended with high social application heat; Clinical Medicine/Animal Medicine is recommended; Accounting/Finance/Auditing is recommended; Law is divided and wait-and-see; Civil Engineering/Architecture is divided and wait-and-see; Biology/Chemistry/Environment/Materials are clearly discouraged. The university's enrollment majors are mainly in agriculture, forestry, biology, environment, and food, with overall major popularity being relatively cold. In terms of Shanxi Province candidate scale, the number of Physics Category candidates in 2025 was approximately 173,347, and in 2026 approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (about -3.4%), slightly easing competition. Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, with an enrollment share in Shanxi Province of about 4.68% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no local preference advantage. The university's enrollment share in Sichuan Province is much higher than in other provinces, so Shanxi candidates need to consider regional preference factors when applying.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking trends, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a decrease of about 3.4% in Shanxi Province Physics Category candidates, the university's mid-to-lower tier 211 status, cold major popularity, and average Douyin attention, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 32426, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to move slightly forward (competition slightly easing). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 32226, with a range of 31726 to 32726.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 32226, with a range of 31726 to 32726. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range are advised to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch (popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science typically require rankings higher than the university line), and use Tier 3 majors as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., below 31726) can focus on applying for Tier 1 flagship majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety. The university's advantageous disciplines, Animal Science (A) and Crop Science (A-), correspond to Animal Science and Agriculture majors, which, despite strong academic strength, have low social popularity, making them suitable for candidates with a clear interest in agriculture and forestry to enter advantageous majors at a lower ranking.
